Video.summary: When one of Eastbridge's most powerful socialities, is murdered, it is discovered she has been running a call girl service and one name on her list of clients is Commissioner Scali!
Video.title: The Rolodex Madam

Video.summary: As Halloween approaches, a heart is cut from the body of a corpse at a funeral home and concerned Eastbridge parents pressure Tony to protect their children from the suspect, an eccentric recluse.
Video.title: The Witches Of Eastbridge

Video.summary: Tony winds up in one of his own jail cells when he runs afoul of an imperious judge.
Video.title: Judgement Day

Video.summary: Commissioner -- and expectant father -- Tony Scali suddenly finds his own life on the line after he infiltrates a New York pornographic teenage film ring.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Video.summary: A bizarre murder is a biochemist's effort to conceal the killing of a woman's husband in order to win her.
Video.title: Me, Myself & Die

Video.summary: After seeing his mother killed by a stranger, a boy withdraws deep into himself, prompting a sympathetic Tony to step up his efforts to catch the murderer.
Video.title: The Wicked Flee

Video.summary: Tony's son David is shocked when his friend Jason shoots Brad Harris, the school bully. What follows is a crisis of conscience.
Video.title: Guns & Sons

Video.summary: After he shoots a woman in a drunken domestic squabble, Officer Kelly becomes the victim of a campaign.
Video.title: Officer April

Video.summary: A mugging triggers a woman's repressed memory of her brother's murder, which she witnessed as a child.
Video.title: Skeletons

Video.summary: The unwelcome appearance in Eastbridge of white supremacists leads to a murder, with the suspicion soon arising that one of more Tony's associates may be implicated.
Video.title: True Believers

Video.summary: During the holiday season, Tony investigates the murder of an elderly woman.
Video.title: No Greater Gift

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through LA where a crime wave threatens to tear the community apart.
Video.title: City Under Siege, Part 3

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through LA where a crime wave threatens to tear the community apart.
Video.title: City Under Siege, Part 1

Video.summary: Vietnamese gangs threaten Eastbridge and Tony steps in to help.
Video.title: Charlie Don't Surf

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali's friend and colleague, Chief of Detectives Irv Wallerstein, is struck down.
Video.title: The Fourth Man

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through LA where a crime wave threatens to tear the community apart.
Video.title: City Under Siege, Part 2

Video.summary: When Hunter refuses to reveal an informant to a Grand Jury, he is sent to jail, as a convicted murder is freed
Video.title: Informant

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali, kidnapped and seemingly destined for sudden death, narrowly escapes his fate with the help of an unsuspected ally -- porno movie producer Cyd Palmer.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Video.summary: Chris is wounded when he's set up for a hit man.
Video.title: Look The Other Way

Video.summary: As he and Cassy investigate the mysterious death of a newlywed couple, Tom seeks advice on gening back into the dating game.
Video.title: Guilt By Association

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy are called in to investigate the mysterious deaths of a wealthy woman's pets.
Video.title: Night Of The Parrot

Video.summary: A murder investigation uncovers evidence of a political assassination about to take place in Palm Beach. Cassy investigate a murder.
Video.title: Air-Tight Alibi

Video.summary: The investigation of an apparent car accident uncovers a murder scheme.
Video.title: Family Affair

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy set out to acquit a close friend who's been accused of murder.
Video.title: Child's Play

Video.summary: Cassy is ostracized by her fellow cops when she's assigned to investigate a detective's shooting of his wife.
Video.title: The Wedge

Video.summary: A private investigator's death while scuba diving leads Cassy and Tom to pirates salvaging sunken treasures.
Video.title: Pirates Of Palm Beach
